prose:
**Phenol Fukui-reactivity result** — computed with DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in the **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1, using the chemkit `fukui-reactivity` skill (`program`: `dft`; Mulliken charges from PySCF were used for the Fukui indices). Geometry: fixed user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`; no geometry optimization was reported for this task. Solvent was `null`, i.e. gas phase. Density fitting was **not** requested (`--density-fit` was not passed). Software version was not reported by the tool.

Headline site result: the most electrophilic site is **atom 3 (C)** with **f+ = 2.1028319**. The most nucleophilic site is **atom 1 (O)** with **f− = 0.16201477**.

Per-atom Fukui indices, in the atom order returned by the tool (`O, C, C, C, C, C, C, H, H, H, H, H, H`):

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | -0.99513677 | 0.16201477 | -0.416561 | -1.1571515 |
| 2 | C | 0.39933188 | 0.048772551 | 0.22405222 | 0.35055933 |
| 3 | C | 2.1028319 | 0.070972379 | 1.0869022 | 2.0318595 |
| 4 | C | 1.6196806 | 0.070498539 | 0.84508955 | 1.549182 |
| 5 | C | -0.34200644 | 0.026704972 | -0.15765074 | -0.36871141 |
| 6 | C | -0.28910825 | 0.020949414 | -0.13407942 | -0.31005767 |
| 7 | C | 1.3079753 | 0.12351549 | 0.71574539 | 1.1844598 |
| 8 | H | -0.73391779 | 0.082321145 | -0.32579832 | -0.81623893 |
| 9 | H | -0.27465615 | 0.088147788 | -0.093254183 | -0.36280394 |
| 10 | H | -0.91706058 | 0.081105985 | -0.4179773 | -0.99816656 |
| 11 | H | -0.62991625 | 0.080487046 | -0.2747146 | -0.7104033 |
| 12 | H | -0.29591676 | 0.09349577 | -0.1012105 | -0.38941253 |
| 13 | H | 0.047899337 | 0.051014152 | 0.049456744 | -0.0031148153 |

Charged-state settings used by the tool: cation charge +1, cation multiplicity 2; anion charge −1, anion multiplicity 2.

Tool integrity verdict: `integrity.trustworthy = true` (`status`: `ok`). No top-level `warnings` array was returned by the tool. The integrity-check messages returned by the tool were:
- `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `common header present`

Reproducibility artifacts returned by chemkit: plot at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-152237_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Exact CLI invocation reported by the tool: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp6qbftkim/live.json`. The chemkit API result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot report one without fabricating it.
